name: Rectangular Slot Antenna
description: A rectangular aperture cut into a conducting ground plane that radiates electromagnetic energy. The slot acts as a magnetic dipole with radiation characteristics complementary to a wire dipole of similar dimensions.

length.name: Slot Length
length.description: Length of the rectangular slot aperture

width.name: Slot Width
width.description: Width of the rectangular slot aperture

groundPlaneSize.name: Ground Plane Dimension
groundPlaneSize.description: Minimum dimension of the conducting ground plane

feedOffset.name: Feed Offset
feedOffset.description: Distance from slot center to feed point

designMethodology.overview: Design process involves determining slot dimensions for resonance, calculating radiation resistance, and optimizing feed location for impedance matching.

steps.title: Determine Operating Frequency
steps.description: Select center frequency and calculate free-space wavelength

steps.title: Calculate Slot Length
steps.description: Set slot length for half-wave resonance with end effects

steps.title: Determine Slot Width
steps.description: Choose width based on bandwidth and impedance requirements

steps.title: Calculate Radiation Resistance
steps.description: Compute radiation resistance at slot center

steps.title: Design Ground Plane
steps.description: Ensure adequate ground plane size for pattern integrity

equations.resonantFrequency: fr = c / (2 * L_eff) where L_eff = L + 2 * delta_L
equations.inputImpedance: Zin = Rr + j * X where Rr = 73 * (W/lambda)^2 * (sin(pi*L/lambda))^2
equations.radiationPattern: E_theta = j * k * E0 * W * L * sinc(k*W*sin(theta)*cos(phi)/2) * sinc(k*L*sin(theta)*sin(phi)/2)

mockSolverHints.impedanceModel: Use cavity model with magnetic current distribution and radiation resistance calculation based on aperture field
mockSolverHints.radiationModel: Apply Huygens principle with uniform magnetic current density across aperture, include ground plane effects

references: Balanis, C.A., 'Antenna Theory: Analysis and Design', 4th Edition, Chapter 12
Stutzman, W.L. and Thiele, G.A., 'Antenna Theory and Design', 3rd Edition, Chapter 8
Volakis, J.L., 'Antenna Engineering Handbook', 4th Edition, Chapter 11
